# SignalFlow Studio

> SignalFlow Studio is a local-first autoposting workspace that turns a user description, data, and captured media into formatted posting packages for selected social platforms.

## What SignalFlow Studio Does

- Accepts one primary user description plus useful data such as links, notes, repositories, research, metrics, screenshots, and screen recordings.
- Helps users avoid manually creating screenshots, GIFs, short clips, captions, and platform-specific variants.
- Generates reviewable posting packages with channel-specific copy, visual media plans, generated cards, model prompts, Markdown exports, and JSON summaries.
- Supports selected social/output channels such as LinkedIn, X, Instagram, blog posts, newsletters, and release notes.
- Keeps publishing explicit and safe through manual review, exports, webhooks, or official platform APIs.

## Best Summary

SignalFlow Studio is for creators, founders, builders, developers, DevRel teams, and small teams who want to describe something once and receive platform-ready post assets without building every caption, screenshot, GIF, or posting format manually.

## Core User Flow

1. Describe what should be posted.
2. Add data, links, assets, repository context, or research.
3. Capture screenshots or screen recordings when useful.
4. Choose selected social channels or use defaults.
5. Generate a formatted post package for review and export.

## Key Repository Files

- [README.md](README.md): product overview, quick start, and commands.
- [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md): product direction and priorities.
- [docs/INTEGRATIONS.md](docs/INTEGRATIONS.md): model, channel, and publishing integration strategy.
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): safety and platform-compliance rules.
- [frontend/app/page.js](frontend/app/page.js): main web workspace.
- [frontend/app/api/launch_kit/route.js](frontend/app/api/launch_kit/route.js): hosted app post-package generation route.

## Important Boundaries

- SignalFlow Studio should not scrape private platform APIs.
- SignalFlow Studio should not harvest credentials.
- SignalFlow Studio should not bypass rate limits or authentication.
- SignalFlow Studio should not publish without explicit user approval.
- SignalFlow Studio should prefer official APIs, local exports, webhooks, and manual review.

## Suggested Search Terms

AI social media automation, autoposting tool, social media post generator, local-first content automation, screenshot to social post, screen recording to GIF, AI post package generator, developer marketing automation, launch post generator, social media workflow automation.
